title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes:
#Note: if hard to read: # starts a new line!
#Very difficult to run on Ubuntu 16.04.5, afterwards just 2 crashes/freezes in 45 hours of game play. X-Box 1708,1790 Controller works fine and without any installation/configuration if connected through an USB cable (not wireless!)
#
#Steps to run on Proton 3.16-5 Beta (inspired by: https://github.com/Winetricks/winetricks):
#install winetricks:
#>wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Winetricks/winetricks/master/src/winetricks
#>chmod +x winetricks
#>sudo mv winetricks /usr/bin
#>wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Winetricks/winetricks/master/src/winetricks.bash-completion
#>sudo mv winetricks.bash-completion /usr/share/bash-completion/completions/winetricks
#
#Install freetype + cabextract, if necessary (check via ls -al /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ | grep freetype, etc):
#>sudo apt-get install cabextract libfreetype6-dev:i386
#
#Change DirectX driver:
#>( PATH=$PATH:~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.16\ Beta/dist/bin/ WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks d3dx9 )
#
#If required, switch language (see https://steamcommunity.com/app/214510/discussions/0/864951657986114999/?l=german):
#>( PATH=$PATH:~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.16\ Beta/dist/bin/ WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ wine regedit )
#Windows regedit opens, seek HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node
#Add new key: Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment
#Within new key: new key: LEGOLOTR
#Within new key: new DWORD: LanguageVal
#On new value: Value: 407 (hexadecimal)
#Close dialog, start game via steam.

#Note: every now and then the game keeps running hidden after leaving it (steam client states, it is still running). killall -9 LEGOLOTR.exe solves this
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings
LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Stuck during the first cinematic after starting a game. Neither installing dx9 with winetricks nor putting the NO_D3D11 launch option worked.
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings
LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: To prevent the game from crashing after first splash screen, I had to run this in a terminal: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks directx9 (as advised here: https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1836). Works nicely, except for a few minor inconveniences. As in many games running with Proton (and before that, Wine) sound crackles after a long while. Restarting the game is enough to stop it. And as in many Lego Games, events may not be triggered correctly: obviously not a Proton problem, happens to everybody on every system. If this really irks you, I would recommend to try Lego The Hobbit instead, which I find overall much more stable, and better designed. Coincidentally, it runs often out of the box with Proton ;)
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Works nice after trick: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks directx9
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes:
Seems to work without needing the entire DirectX 9.


export W="~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Proton 3.16 Beta/dist"
export WINEVERPATH=$W
export PATH=$W/bin:$PATH
export WINESERVER=$W/bin/wineserver
export WINELOADER=$W/bin/wine
export WINEDLLPATH=$W/lib/wine/fakedlls
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$W/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"
export WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx
# Note on some distros .steam may or may not have symlinks to ~/.local/share/Steam.
# If above does not work for WINEPREFIX, use 
# export WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx
winetricks d3dx9_41

title: LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™

notes: Seems to work fine after applying "protontricks 214510 d3dx9_41", like others have stated. Note: protontricks needs to be installed first, but the installation instructions on the GitHub page are very easy. Controller and rumble works. Some performance dips in cutscenes, but gameplay seems to be 100% smooth at 60fps with vsync on.
title: LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™

notes:
Out-of-the-box, Lego LOTR only displayed the loading image, and than closed directly instead of displaying the main menu...
I had to install winetricks and protontricks, and after typing "protontricks 214510 d3dx9_41" once, Lego LOTR now starts fine directly from steam
title: LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™
